log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a UPX compressed PE32 executable, likely a spreader. Investigate the network activity to see if it communicates with any command and control servers.
The sample does not appear to have any network activity, which is unusual for a spreader. Investigate the registry changes to see if it attempts to persist itself.
The sample does not appear to attempt to persist itself in the registry. Investigate the dropped files to see if it writes any files to disk.
The sample drops two executable files in the user's temp directory. Investigate the process activity to see if it spawns any suspicious processes.
